Gopay Flow

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirement

Local Entity

  • Director KTP Number

  • NPWP Company Number

  • The Most Updated - Date of Establishment

  • Deed of Establishment (Akta Pendirian)

  • Decree of the Minister of Justice for Establishment (SK Pendirian)

  • Deed of Amendment (if any) (Akta Perubahan)

  • Decree of the Minister of Justice for Amendment (if any) (SK Perubahan)

  • Website

  • Business Email

  • Company Name

  • Shareholder Name

  • License for some industries: list here

Foreign Entity

Dokumen Legalitas

  • Passport & KITAS

  • Nomor Identitas Pajak (Tax ID) Merchant

  • Akta Pendirian Perusahaan (sebagai misal articles of association, memorandum of association, articles of incorporation, dan dokumen relevan lainnya)

  • Akta Perubahan terakhir (jika ada)

  • Dokumen Izin Kegiatan Usaha (Diterbitkan oleh negara asal Merchant)

Dokumen Penerima Manfaat (Beneficial Owner)

  • Passport & KITAS

  • Nomor Identitas Pajak (Tax ID) Beneficial Owner

  • Formulir Pemilik Manfaat (BO Form): link here

Additionals

Tokenizations

  • Merchant Due Diligence Form (PLEASE MAKE A COPY)

  • Questionnaire

Restricted Business

  • Not have restricted business as long as merchant already pass MO KYC

Website Requirements

  • Not have website requirements as long as pass MO BDD KYC

Website Requirements

  • Digital (Voucher game and streaming)

  • Non-digital (all)

Onboarding Step (Phase 1)

No

PIC

Detail Steps

1

MO

MO will check the merchant list that already filtered by AM and Sales team for piloting GoPay Onboarding and Activation Trackerin AM/Sales Tracker tab

2

MO

After MO know which merchant that onboard to Gopay, MO will create MID through Midtrans Portal https://dashboard.midtrans.com/partner/login. MO will login to the midtrans dashboard with credential:

  • Email: merchantops@xendit.co

  • Password: XenditOPS123#@!

3

MO

After got login, MO can click “Add Merchant”

4

MO

MO need filled merchant detail for each column with details:

  • Merchant Name -> filled with Merchant Business Name/Legal Name

  • Admin Name -> filled with Merchant Business Name/Legal Name

  • E-mail -> filled email with format merchantops+66@xendit.co (the number will always updated)

  • Phone Number -> merchant phone number

  • Password and Confirm Password -> filled with easy password like “Merchantops123!” (should be contains symbol, upper letter case and number)

After that click “Submit”

4a

MO

To get merchant’s MID, click Edit Profile > Roles & assigned merchants > tick Select All > Submit.

5

MO

After click Submit, MO will direct to Home Page and seeing the merchant automatically get their MID

Notes: MO can filtered the merchant as Merchant Name or Merchant ID (MID)

6

MO

After merchant have their MID, MO can go to GoPay Onboarding and Activation Trackerand input all merchant details along with merchant MID detail from column A to column Y

7

MO

After the details has been inputted completely, MO can send the Gopay Onboarding Form via semi automation that already been built

8

MO

MO tick the Submit Organization box. Click GoPay Form on menu bar above, then click Kirim Form.

9

MO

It will give MO pop-up notif running script and click Send Email & PDF.

9a

MO

Then, it will running and will give MO notification that generating the Gopay onboarding form and send it to email has been successfully done.

10

MO

MO under merchantops@xendit.co will receive email with subject GoPay Merchant Registration Form - (Merchant Name) it indicate that the email has been send to Gopay Onboarding team along with attached Gopay Onboarding Form

10a

MO

MO will upload all of merchant legal document into shared Gdrive between Xendit and Gopay Gopay <> Xendit Shared Documentsby create folder and put name based on merchant Legal Name and update the folder link in column T on [SHARED] List Merchant XENDIT <> Midtrans

11

Gopay

MO will give feedback on [SHARED] List Merchant XENDIT <> Midtranswhether the merchant has been approved from Gopay side or even need resubmission in terms of LDD or BDD (Website) in column O

12

MO

If need resubmission MO will check what kind of information Gopay need and can ask to Sales/AM/CPS on thread

12a

MO

If already get feedback from Sales/AM/CPS, MO can go to the gdrive again Gopay <> Xendit Shared Documentsand upload the document there and inform Gopay Onboarding team under giya.aprilriani@midtrans.comon WAG

13

MO

If Gopay are directly approved, MO need to double check with delta.riangga@gojek.comand giya.aprilriani@midtrans.comto do the pre-GoLive configuration and whitelist from Gopay side to update the status on Midtrans Portal from Not Confirmed into Live

14

MO

If the merchant has been whitelisted by Gopay and the status has been changed into Live, MO can go to Midtrans portal to do the activation from MO side

15

MO

MO can login again to https://dashboard.midtrans.com/partner/login with same credential as when MO create MID in Midtrans Portal and searching merchant who already have Live status

16

MO

MO can logout by click Log Out from Partner Midtrans Portal and can go to Merchant Midtrans Portal

17

MO

MO needs to forget password by input the merchant email that registered on Partner Midtrans Portal based on [SHARED] List Merchant XENDIT <> Midtransin column E

18

MO

Then MO will get notification on Merchantops email and can click the Change My Password, need to input new password and put the password in the GoPay Onboarding and Activation Trackeron column AC

Notes: The password would contain format Merchantops+(number)!

19

MO

MO will click Login and direct to Merchant Midtrans Portal Dashboard and click the Settings dropdown and choose the Access Key

20

MO

MO will see the incomplete credential

21

MO

To get completed credential, MO need to go to Channel Activation V2 retool with details:

  • Input the merchant BID

  • Choose the PT Sinar Digital Terdepan transaction entity

  • Choose Ewallet category and choose the Gopay as channel

  • The credential field can leave it as blank and click Next

  • MO can click Activate

22

MO

After that, MO will need go to Payment Setting tab using the same merchant BID and click edit button (pencil button) on Gopay.

Notes: the Gopay status would have Pending status and this expected

23

MO

MO will change the settlement from NaN into T+1 and click Next

24

MO

Then, MO check the field of Public Key and copy paste the credentials by drag down the button on screenshot

It would appear like below screenshot

Notes: On mac combine command + A and Windows for CTRL + A to copy paste all credentials until the END OF PUBLIC KEY

25

MO

After copy paste MO go back to Midtrans portal and click Start Generate Credential and input it on Merchant Public Key and click Register

26

MO

MO will get pop up notif as Public Key Registered and other credentials will appear completely

27

MO

MO will go back to retool and input all the credential on by one based on the credential usage on Midtrans portal with details:

  • Client ID -> on Midtrans Portal

  • Client Key -> on Midtrans Portal

  • Client Secret -> on Midtrans Portal

  • Merchant ID -> on Midtrans Portal

  • Partner Public Key -> will refer to step 30 and 31

  • Private Key -> leave as it is

  • Public Key -> leave as it is

  • Server Key -> on Midtrans Portal

Notes: Please do not click Next yet, MO need to generate the partner public key in this case

28

MO

MO need click Register IP Address and filled the IP Address one by one based on the IP Address list GoPay Pilot Merchanton tab Generic Setting

Filled 6 IP Address manually by click button + Add More and click Submit

29

MO

MO will get another pop up notification as IP Address is submitted and the IP Address would have In Progress status meaning need get whitelist by Gopay

30

MO

MO will click the configure notification and input the API connector based on GoPay Pilot Merchanton column B and copy paste into Notification URL endpoint field then click Save and Midtrans Public Key field would be automatically generated along with another pop up notification

31

MO

MO copy paste the Midtrans Public Key and go back to retool and paste the Midtrans Public Key into and click Next -> Submit -> Done on retool

32

MO

MO click toggle status on Gopay again and click Confirm to change the status from Pending into Active

33

MO

MO will go back to Midtrans portal anc click the Email Notification tab

34

MO

MO will copy paste the email based on GoPay Pilot Merchanton column C and paste to:

  • Field of Withdrawal report email

  • Finance PIC email -> with recon_reports@xendit.co email only

  • The other leave it as it is

Then, click Save

35

MO

MO click Daily Report tab

36

MO

MO will copy paste again the email based on GoPay Pilot Merchantand paste to Do you want to receive daily transaction report? (Field) and checklist the YES option.

Then the Choose information that you want to show in your daily report section can checklist all except Payment Details option. and click Save Preferences

Notes: The other option can leave as it is

37

MO

Next MO will add Bank Account details on tab Billing

  • Bank Account Info: PT Sinar Digital Terdepan

  • Bank Name: PT. BANK CENTRAL ASIA TBK.

  • Branch: Kebayoran Baru

  • A/C: 0702611111

38

MO

MO also will set up Billing Configuration

Choose Repeat Every Daily and 1 woking day

39

MO

The set up of activation has been done from MO side, MO need to inform delta.riangga@gojek.comgiya.aprilriani@midtrans.comin Gopay Xendit WAG in order to inform whitelisting the IP Address.

40

Gopay

Gopay will inform that whitelist IP Address has been done from their side and merchant can consider as Gopay Activated

41

MO

MO need to change the merchant MDR on Admin Dashboard at billing rate with details:

  • If merchant are activated with 1.8% MDR (non-digital) in billing rate MO should adjust the billing as 2%

  • If merchant are activated with 4.5% MDR (digital) in billing rate MO should adjust the billing as 5%

42

MO

MO can inform requestor Sales/AM/CPS/CS that merchant Gopay has been activated completely

GoPay Later

Gopay pay later can process for all merchants, for this pay later, there’s no requirement for minimum TPV etc, as long as their Gopay already activated we can process for pay later activation. Process approval and additional license will be judged case by case from the GoPay team.
